experiment_info.experiment_description: Segmentation-conditioned diffusion model with Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG)
experiment_info.research_question: Can segmentation-conditioned generation with CFG produce anatomically faithful 3D medical images?

dataset_info.preprocessing: Percentile clip (0.5-99.5%), crop foreground, pad to cubic, resize to 32^3, normalize to [-1,1]
